subcodes.first_line: O lover of truth! Thy letter hath arrived and its contents have become clear. Know thou that the banner of peace is raised aloft and the star [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاشق حقیقت نامه رسید و مضمون مفهوم گردید بدان رایت سلام بلند است و کوکب
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity
